theme: Shortest cyclic string hitting all allowed windows
title: Balanced Tour of the Forbidden-Window de Bruijn Graph
strategies: trivial: per-edge BFS stitching in a fixed unrelated order (checker's own baseline)
greedy: single continuous DFS walk preferring unused local edges, falls back to blind retracing when stuck

strong: reformulate as an Eulerian-tour problem on the (L-1)-mer de Bruijn graph with forbidden edges deleted; compute per-node in/out imbalance and splice in shortest allowed paths (a greedy min-cost transportation matching) to restore balance before running Hierholzer's algorithm
invalid: emits a string missing required windows / containing a forbidden window
